label: Fault tolerance, security, energy & cost optimization

node.label: Fault tolerance, security, energy & cost optimization
node.definition: Reliability and cost operations manage failures, replication, quotas, capacity, security, energy, carbon, and economic efficiency across AI workloads.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Fault tolerance, security, energy & cost optimization is to connect Distributed systems & networking, Adversarial robustness & security testing to downstream capabilities including Large language models.
limitations: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Distributed systems & networking, Adversarial robustness & security testing.

dependencies.rationale: Fault tolerance, security, energy & cost optimization turns Distributed systems & networking into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Fault tolerance, security, energy & cost optimization turns Adversarial robustness & security testing into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Fault tolerance, security, energy & cost optimization turns Batching, admission control & GPU scheduling into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Fault tolerance, security, energy & cost optimization turns Optimization theory into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
